title: Glitter Cay tower
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Glitter Cay tower''' was a building in [[Wildwater City]] on the planet [[Dac/Legends|Dac]].

Eight full levels of the tower were occupied by the [[Fathoms]] resort.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-05-12 -->''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]''
